headline: How The Valero Energy (VLO) Narrative Is Shifting With Mixed Analyst Targets And Lawsuit News
summary: Valero Energy’s modeled fair value has changed only slightly, moving from US$246.67 to US$247.33 per share, but that small adjustment follows a busy stretch of analyst activity. Across the Street, you are seeing higher price targets from several firms alongside a downgrade and a list removal, which together suggest a more debated view of where the shares should trade. Below, you will see how to interpret these moves and keep up with the evolving narrative around Valero. Stay updated as the...
